name: Favorite Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup butter or margarine, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Butter a 9-inch fluted or plain tube pan.
3. In a large bowl of electric mixer, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs, sour cream, and vanilla extract.
4. Stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gradually beat into the butter mixture.
5. Prepare topping by scattering half the topping evenly over the bottom of the pan. Spoon in half the batter. Add remaining topping and spoon on the remaining batter.
6. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
7. Makes one 9-inch coffee cake, serving 8 to 12 people.
8. Topping: In a small bowl, combine nuts, sugar, and cinnamon.
Timesaver Tip: The coffee cake may be made ahead and frozen before baking. Wrap the tube pan tightly with heavy-duty aluminum foil, label and date, and freeze at 0 degrees F up to 6 weeks. To bake, remove foil and bake at 350 degrees F until the cake tests done, about 1 hour. Cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
